summary: Tested PaymentScreen role-based access control and internal transaction number features. All 9 backend tests pass + 2 frontend Playwright tests pass. Waitress users are correctly blocked from PaymentScreen and redirected to /tables. Admin/Cashier/Manager users can access PaymentScreen. Internal transaction number is correctly generated and included in comanda, pre-check, and bill payment responses.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Waitress user has role 'waiter' (NOT in allowed payment roles: admin, cashier, manager) ✅
TEST 2: Admin user has role 'admin' (allowed to process payments) ✅
TEST 3: Cashier user (PIN 4321, not 1234) has role 'cashier' (allowed to process payments) ✅
TEST 4: /api/print/send-comanda/{order_id} includes internal_transaction_number in comanda data ✅
TEST 6: /api/bills/{bill_id}/pay saves internal_transaction_number in paid bill response ✅
TEST 7: Transaction counter increments sequentially across multiple payments ✅
TEST 8: PaymentScreen.js has allowedRoles=['admin','cashier','manager'] and canProcessPayment check ✅
TEST 9: PaymentScreen.js redirects unauthorized users to /tables with error toast ✅
critical_code_review_comments: PaymentScreen.js lines 176-184: Correctly defines allowedRoles=['admin','cashier','manager'] and uses useEffect to redirect unauthorized users
billing.py lines 40-52: get_next_transaction_number() uses atomic MongoDB find_one_and_update with upsert for sequential counter
billing.py lines 339, 358: pay_bill correctly gets and saves internal_transaction_number in bill
server.py lines 1748, 1769: send_comanda_to_queue generates internal_trans_num and includes it in comanda_data
server.py lines 2038, 2045, 2063: send_precheck_to_printer generates internal_trans_num, saves to pre_check_prints, and displays in ESC/POS commands

test_credentials_used.note: PIN 1234 is Carlos (waiter), not cashier as originally specified

features_verified.payment_screen_role_restriction: PASS - Only admin, cashier, manager can access PaymentScreen
features_verified.waitress_redirect: PASS - Waitress users redirected to /tables with toast error
features_verified.internal_transaction_number_in_comanda: PASS - send_comanda returns internal_transaction_number in job data
features_verified.internal_transaction_number_in_precheck: PASS - send_precheck generates and stores internal_transaction_number
features_verified.internal_transaction_number_in_bill_paym: PASS - pay_bill saves internal_transaction_number in bill
features_verified.transaction_counter_sequential: PASS - Counter increments atomically using MongoDB counters collection

context_for_next_testing_agent: PaymentScreen permission control verified working. Uses useEffect with canProcessPayment check. Internal transaction number feature fully implemented: 1) get_next_transaction_number() in billing.py and server.py uses MongoDB atomic counter, 2) send_comanda includes it in job data, 3) send_precheck includes it in ESC/POS commands and stores in pre_check_prints, 4) pay_bill saves it in bill document. Counter collection: 'counters', document _id: 'internal_transaction', field: 'seq'. Note: PIN 1234 = Carlos (waiter), PIN 4321 = Luis (cashier), PIN 5678 = Maria (waiter).
